issues.summary: label: Ensure every form element has a label
issues.html_snippet: <input class="file-display form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" data-drupal-selector="edit-imagefile-file-limited-0-display" type="checkbox" id="edit-imagefile-file-limited-0-display" name="imagefile_file_limited[0][display]" value="1" checked="checked">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element does not have an implicit (wrapped) <label>
  Element does not have an explicit <label>
  aria-label attribute does not exist or is empty
  aria-labelledby attribute does not exist, references elements that do not exist or references elements that are empty
  Element has no title attribute
  Element has no placeholder attribute
  Element's default semantics were not overridden with role="none" or role="presentation"
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/contact/imagefile_file
Use the matching context from Conditions: `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule label on selector #edit-imagefile-file-limited-N-display.

issues.summary: color-contrast: Ensure the contrast between foreground and background colors meets WCAG 2 AA min
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.38 (foreground color: #c55228, background color: #fefaf8, font size: 12.0pt (16px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.suggested_fix: Check foreground/background color combinations. Ensure ratio ≥ 4.5:1 for normal text, ≥ 3:1 for large text (18pt or 14pt bold). Update the relevant CSS file.
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/action-link
Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule color-contrast on selector a[hreflang="he"].

issues.summary: "Select all rows" checkbox is labeled only by its title attribute
issues.selector: input[title="Select all rows in this table"]
issues.html_snippet: <input type="checkbox" class="form-checkbox form-boolean form-boolean--type-checkbox" title="Select all rows in this table">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Only title used to generate label for form element
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Checkbox has a visible or visually-hidden <label>, or aria-label
issues.actual_behaviour: input[title="Select all rows in this table"] — title is the sole label source
issues.suggested_fix:
Replace the title-only label with aria-label:

<!-- Before (broken) -->
<input type="checkbox" title="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">

<!-- After (fixed) -->
<input type="checkbox"
  aria-label="{{ 'Select all rows in this table'|t }}">
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/content
Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule label-title-only on selector input[title="Select all rows in this table"].

issues.summary: tabindex: Ensure tabindex attribute values are not greater than 0

issues.summary: region: Ensure all page content is contained by landmarks
issues.html_snippet: <div class="themeswitcher-form__form-item js-form-item form-item js-form-type-select form-type--select js-form-item-preferred-theme form-item--preferred-theme">
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Some page content is not contained by landmarks
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure all visible content is inside a landmark element (<main>, <nav>, <aside>, <header>, <footer>). Check page.html.twig and block placement.
issues.interaction_hint: This issue may require opening a dialog/off-canvas panel before running axe.
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/

Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile), `olivero` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule region on selector .themeswitcher-form__form-item.

issues.summary: landmark-contentinfo-is-top-level: Ensure the contentinfo landmark is at top level
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  The contentinfo landmark is contained in another landmark.
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/appearance
Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule landmark-contentinfo-is-top-level on selector .messages--error.

issues.summary: Status messages block uses role="contentinfo", duplicating the page <footer>
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Document has more than one contentinfo landmark
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.expected_behaviour: Status messages use role="status" (non-error) or role="alert" (errors)
issues.actual_behaviour: <div role="contentinfo" aria-labelledby="…"> — conflicts with the page footer landmark
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/admin/appearance
Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule landmark-no-duplicate-contentinfo on selector .messages--error.

issues.summary: heading-order: Ensure the order of headings is semantically correct
issues.failure_summary:
Fix any of the following:
  Heading order invalid
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.suggested_fix: Heading levels must not skip. Audit the page heading hierarchy and adjust template markup.

Use the matching context from Conditions: `admin` (light desktop, light mobile), `claro` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule heading-order on selector div[data-drupal-selector="edit-test-datelist"] > h4.

issues.summary: Homepage has no <h1> heading — screen reader users cannot identify page topic
issues.failure_summary:
Fix all of the following:
  Page must have a level-one heading
issues.template_hint: Could not infer template from selector
issues.drupal_file:
core/themes/olivero/templates/layout/page--front.html.twig
    Site configuration (site name / front page node)
issues.expected_behaviour: Every page contains exactly one <h1> that identifies the page
issues.actual_behaviour: Olivero front page renders no <h1>; the site name in the header is not an <h1>
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://drupal-core.ddev.site/
Use the matching context from Conditions: `olivero` (dark desktop, dark mobile, light desktop, light mobile)
Open browser DevTools and run axe.run() in the Console.
Confirm rule page-has-heading-one on selector html.
